questionHtml: Compare and contrast fundamental and realized niche of a species.
markschemeHtml:
a. both describe the habitat/role/relationship occupied by a species ✔

b. the fundamental niche is the potential role of a species in its ecosystem and realized niche is the actual role
OR
the fundamental niche depends on the adaptations of a species whereas the realized niche is limited by competition/predation
OR
realized niche is ‹usually› smaller than fundamental niche ✔

meta.title: Compare and contrast fundamental and realized niche of a species.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
